text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? ...What's this strange form? If I try
interpreting it, it seems to mean that in the near
future...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(A light will come my way—a huge vortex of light.
But that vortex...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It has a little darkness in the center. It's a bit like
a donut of light.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sensing any ill will from it. The good
aspects are way more prevalent.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Good fortune is right around the corner! Better
luck than I've ever experienced in my life is on the
way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The uproarious tide of luck comes all of a sudden,
engulfing Copano Rickey and her entire life with
it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey! Please give me a moment of your
time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Uh... Trainer, why are there so many people here?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Please tell us all about feng shui! Recently, we've
had multiple requests from readers who want to
know more!

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Would you be interested in appearing
on TV? We'd like to have you on our show to
discuss feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: On TV?! Trainer, what's going on?!
choice_data_list:
It looks like feng shui is starting to gain
popularity.

It looks like feng shui is starting to gain
popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like the incident at the Japanese Derby
is what finally sparked this firestorm of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui—a factor that has been entirely absent
from the Twinkle Series until now—is starting to
pique everyone's curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then that means I did it! Everyone finally
understands what makes feng shui so great!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I-I can say yes to all of these offers, right? Right?!
I'll never get another super-mega opportunity like
this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Copano Rickey, this is a dream come true.
And...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...Rickey? What's with all the commotion?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, Tarumae. Sorry. I'm in your way, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But check out how many folks came from all these
media outlets! They're all eager to learn about
feng shui! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Well... I don't really get it, but just try not to
go off on too many detours, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Don't let the media sap all your time and energy, or it'll affect your training.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I know you push yourself too hard, Rickey, so just
make sure you look after yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have to go! My prep plan for the Teio Sho is
calling...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The Teio Sho?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's a G1 dirt race held in Oi. I have to
make sure I do well there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Copano Rickey and Hokko Tarumae set
about working hard to reach their own goals.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! What's next on the schedule again?! The
lecture? The meeting with the publisher?
choice_data_list: Next up is a speaking event!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right, that comes first! I sure hope we make it
in time.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Taxi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hokko Tarumae, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on a fantastic Teio Sho victory,
Hokko Tarumae! We also saw a brilliant
performance from Wonder Acute, who came in
third.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae, as the new dirt champion of the
first half of the season, would you mind sharing a
few words for the camera?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
A few words for the camera? Whew, fantastic...
Now I can finally talk about my hometown!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
My name's Hokko Tarumae and I'm Tomakomai's
tourism ambassador! I hope I can count on
everyone's support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The days fly by, and then, during one particular
TV appearance...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Rickey, the feng shui boom has arrived. Feng shui is all the rage right now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm so happy everyone's finally learning
about it. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And to help everyone learn even more...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'm going to use my feng shui power in a
race against Tarumae. ☆ We'll be competing in
the Champions Cup at the end of the year!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
You're referring to the Hokko Tarumae who won
the Teio Sho, yes? This is bound to be an intense
bout!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
For sure! If I run well in that race, I should be able
to spread feng shui even further!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. You know, I'm not sure there's anyone left
out there who doesn't know about feng shui. Its
current popularity is unprecedented.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we're all looking forward to the race.
Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(There's no one left who doesn't know about feng
shui... Wow. This has been my goal all along...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(And the word's already spread that far, huh. I
guess I'm pretty close to making my dream come
true.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We sure didn't see any of this coming, huh? First
the Japanese Derby and now this.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No one ever paid any attention to feng shui, so
it's wild to see it suddenly become this huge
thing. If this keeps up...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. The reason I run is to get everyone
to believe in the power of feng shui and be
happy, so...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If everyone already believes in feng shui, then
what would I be racing for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have an answer for her. If Copano Rickey's
dream really has come true, then you could say
she's already at the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if that's the case, would it mean she has no
reason to race anymore? She's already achieved
everything she ever hoped to accomplish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep-beep, beep-beep, beep-beep...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! My alarm! I almost forgot! It's time for my
next TV interview!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Trainer! Now's not the time to be
thinking about this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what the future will bring, but for
now, we just need to keep moving forward with
all the momentum we can muster.
